name: Iluka Resources Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$7.5641. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$7.6669 where 5 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$7.5641, stop A$6.7419, target A$8.1800. Risk/reward is 0.75:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
